predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_district.district_name, SUM(fact_maternity_child_care.number_of_maternity_and_child_welfare_centres) AS total
FROM dim_state
JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id
JOIN fact_maternity_child_care ON dim_sub_district.sub_district_id = fact_maternity_child_care.sub_district_id

GROUP BY dim_district.district_name

JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id

question: आयडी १ असलेल्या राज्यासाठी, प्रत्येक जिल्ह्याचे नाव, एकूण ग्रामीण लोकसंख्या आणि एकूण अनुसूचित जमातींची ग्रामीण लोकसंख्या यांची यादी करा; यामध्ये फक्त अशाच उप-जिल्ह्यांचा विचार करा जिथे ग्रामीण लोकसंख्या ५०० पेक्षा जास्त आहे आणि निकाल एकूण ग्रामीण लोकसंख्येनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION), SUM(T3.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_ID = 1 AND T3.RURAL_POPULATION > 500 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC
